---
title: "Example Quarto Document" 
subtitle: "Part of ETC5513 Assignment2"
author: "Your Name" 
date: today
format: 
    html:
        theme: cosmo
        toc: true
    typst: 
        documentclass: article
        toc: true
---

# Header
## Sub-section1

This is example text for main branch.

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false
#| error: false

# load library
library(tidyverse)

# filter only adelie penguins
adelie_penguins <- penguins |>
  filter(species == "Adelie") |>
  head(5)

# inspect data
glimpse(adelie_penguins)

```
```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false
#| error: false

ggplot(penguins, aes(x = flipper_len, y = body_mass, colour = species)) +
  geom_point()
```
